summary: Iteration 3: Comprehensive testing of PumpRadar new features. Backend: 14/14 tests pass (100%). All new API endpoints verified: /api/crypto/history, /api/crypto/snapshots, /api/user/watchlist. Frontend: Dark mode default confirmed, login page shows Google OAuth button + email form, navigation config includes Signal History and My Watchlist routes. Cloudflare rate limiting (429/403) affected Playwright dashboard testing.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Landing page, login page verified. Dashboard testing limited by Cloudflare rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: None needed - existing admin user used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. 14 tests cover: health, email auth, history endpoint (requires auth), snapshots endpoint (public), watchlist CRUD (add/remove), alert settings, signals with scientific reasoning, AI chat, super admin protection. Frontend verified: Dark mode is default, Google OAuth button visible, email/password form works, navigation config includes /history (Signal History) and /watchlist (My Watchlist) routes. Cloudflare bot protection may block Playwright automation with 429/403 errors.

api_test_results.POST /api/auth/login (admin): 200 OK - Returns user with admin role
api_test_results.GET /api/crypto/history?limit=5: 200 OK - Returns historical entries with pump_count, dump_count, market_summary
api_test_results.GET /api/crypto/snapshots?limit=3: 200 OK - Returns detailed snapshots with full signal data (8 pumps, 4 dumps)
api_test_results.POST /api/ai/chat: 200 OK - Returns intelligent English response with market context
api_test_results.GET /api/crypto/signals: 200 OK - Returns 8 pump signals, 4 dump signals with Fear & Greed (23 Extreme Fear)
